refnamediv.refpurpose: Compute distances from a seed within a binary mask.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: distance = imbwdistgeodesic(image, [x y]) distance = imbwdistgeodesic(image, [x y], connectivity)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns shortest-path distances through foreground pixels from the seed. Connectivity may be 4 or 8.

refsection.title: Examples
